推荐场景: 旅行服务台｜综合交通、酒店、餐厅、计划和过去事件
60秒任务: 「A2总 Boss」：A2出门信息综合；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: A2场景综合｜多信息抓取｜简单故事｜任务迁移
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜综合服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
We need to plan the trip from start to finish.（综合计划）
First, check the tickets and passport.（出发准备）
Then book the hotel.（预订）
The train may be late, so let’s leave early.（交通风险）
If the weather is bad, we can change the plan.（天气备选）
I have a booking under ___.（入住）
Can you repeat the room number?（请求重复）
I can’t eat nuts, so please check the menu.（饮食限制）
The order number is ___.（线上订单）
I lost my phone, but a staff member found it.（求助解决）
I forgot my password and need a code.（数字生活）
Yesterday, we went to the station and took a taxi.（过去叙述）
Can you send the address by message?（消息确认）
Everything is okay now.（完成）
Thank you for helping me all day.（感谢）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: trip, ticket, passport, hotel, train, weather, booking, menu, phone, code, address
Verbs: plan, check, book, leave, change, repeat, eat, lose, find, send
Adjectives: late, bad, okay, ready, helpful
Time / Place: first, then, yesterday, now, all day, by message
Chunks: start to finish, leave early, booking under, send address, everything is okay
